ValidationRule.description: When creating a Customer Care - Complaint case, Status must be set to "New" or "Assessment and Investigation" initially. PRIOR: MM NEW: MG 2202.09.22 cleaned up formatting + Error Msg
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE ,ISNEW() ,RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - Complaint' ,NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, 'New')) ,NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status ,'Assessment and Investigation')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_001: When creating a Customer Care - Complaint case, Status must be set to "New" or "Assessment and Investigation" initially.
